---
title: "Schedule"
sidebar: false
toc: false
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

# Workshop Schedule

## 3-hours 

| Time | Topic | Instructor |
|:-----------------:|:------------------------------------:|:-------------:|
| 12:00 - 12:45 | [Workshop Introduction](../slides/Intro2R4researchers_workshop.pdf) | Sichao |
| 12:45 - 2:45 | [Hands-on download](../lessons/lessons.zip) | Sichao |
| 2:45 - 3:00 | Questions and Wrap-up | Sichao |


## Resources

-   [An Introduction to R](https://cran.r-project.org/doc/manuals/R-intro.pdf)
-   [Data carpentry lessons](https://software-carpentry.org/lessons/)
-   [The R graph gallery](https://r-graph-gallery.com/)


## Cheatsheets

-   [base R cheatsheet](../lessons/cheatsheets/base-r-cheat-sheet.pdf)
-   [RStudio cheatsheet](../lessons/cheatsheets/rstudio-ide.pdf)
-   [ggplot2 cheatsheet](../lessons/cheatsheets/data-visualization.pdf)
